name: Hello World
description: First-party example plugin. Exercises the whole NovFora module API end-to-end: a permission key, a domain-event listener, a filter hook, a UI slot, a route, and a reversible migration. Doubles as a living test of the contract.
author: The NovFora Authors

permissions.label: Manage Hello greetings
permissions.description: Demo permission registered by the Hello example plugin (it only ADDS to the catalog; grants are normal acl_entries).
